_meta.description: Design system derived from visual analysis of the Golf Sol Ireland website. This file is the single source of truth for all AI-generated UI in this project. Every design decision must trace back to a token or principle defined here.
_meta.aesthetic: Organic Luxury Golf — a nature-forward, Irish-warmth editorial identity that feels premium without pretension. Think: Condé Nast Traveller meets an Irish golf club brochure. Fluid organic shapes, serious typography, warm gold accents, genuine photography. Never corporate, never generic, never cold.

brand.name: Golf Sol Ireland
brand.subTagline: Costa del Sol — Only. Flights, Accommodation & Transfers for Irish Golfers.
brand.voice: Warm, confident, expert. Written as if a trusted Irish friend who has played every course in Andalusia is personally recommending your trip. Never salesy. Always knowledgeable.
brand.audience: Irish recreational golfers (35–65), group trips, couples, societies. They want premium experiences without the hassle of planning.
brand.usp: Costa del Sol exclusivity. Irish-owned expertise. Preferential tee times. Full-service (courses + hotels + transfers).

colors._principle: The palette is rooted in the golf landscape: deep forest greens, sunlit fairway greens, sky blue skies, golden morning light. Every color must feel like it belongs on a Costa del Sol morning.

forest._note: The anchor dark green. Used for nav (scrolled state), footer, dark sections, strong headings on light.

fairway._note: The vibrant action green. Used for buttons, section labels, icons, hover states, blob fills. Lighter and more saturated than forest.

sage._note: Muted mid-tone green used exclusively for large decorative blob shapes and hover states. Semi-transparent at 20–40% opacity.

gold._note: Warm amber-gold. The HERO accent. Used for primary CTA buttons, star ratings, badge text, highlight numbers. Think morning sunlight on a fairway. Never overused — maximum 1–2 elements per section.

sky._note: Soft blue used as an alternative section background — specifically for the 'Sun, Fairways, No Hassle' and 'Choose Your Courses' sections. Evokes Costa del Sol sky.

sections._note: Each page section uses one of these background tokens. They alternate to create visual rhythm and prevent monotony.

typography._principle: Three-font system. Each font has a specific job and must NOT be substituted. The contrast between the massive serif display and the restrained sans-serif body IS the design. Italic accent serif provides editorial warmth.

display.name: Playfair Display
display._usage: ALL section headings, hero headline, major callouts. NEVER for body copy or UI labels.
display._character: Authoritative, classic, premium. The 700 and 900 weights are used. The contrast between thick and thin strokes gives the site its editorial quality.
display._rule: Headings using this font are always large (min 2rem), often uppercase or title case. Tight line-height (1.0–1.1 for hero, 1.15–1.25 for section heads).

body.name: DM Sans
body._usage: ALL body copy, UI labels, navigation, buttons, badges, captions, metadata. The workhorse font.
body._character: Clean, modern, slightly geometric. Very readable at small sizes. 300 (light) for body copy, 400 for default, 500 for labels/metadata, 600 for button text and semibold emphasis.
body._rule: Never below 11px. Line-height 1.5–1.65 for paragraphs. Letter-spacing: normal for body, tracking-wide (0.05em) for uppercase labels.

accent.name: Cormorant Garamond
accent._usage: Section kicker labels (the small line above a heading), pull quotes, decorative captions, the 'We do the tee!' badge text, footer taglines.
accent._character: Delicate, refined, editorial. Almost always used in italic. Creates warmth and humanity against the bold display font.
accent._rule: Always small (12–18px). Often italic. Color is always fairway.600 on light backgrounds or gold.400 on dark. Never bold.

scale._note: Tailwind class names mapped to their semantic roles

heroHeadline._note: The big hero title. 'YOUR TAILOR-MADE GOLF HOLIDAY'. ALL CAPS or Title Case. Tight tracking.

sectionHeadline._note: Main heading of each page section. Often 2 lines. Mix of all-caps and Title Case.

sectionKicker._note: The small label that appears ABOVE a section headline. e.g. 'Design your golf package', 'Step 1 — Let's Tee Off'. Always italic accent font.

cardTitle._note: Card headings — course names, hotel names. Body font semibold, never display font.

bodyLarge._note: Lead paragraphs under section headlines. Max-width constrained (~28–36rem).

body._note: Standard body copy in cards and secondary sections.

small._note: Captions, metadata, location labels, amenity tags, pricing notes.

spacing._principle: Generous. White space is used confidently. Sections breathe. Cards have comfortable internal padding. The layout never feels cramped.

borderRadius._principle: Everything is rounded. Sharp corners are forbidden. The level of rounding signals the hierarchy of the element.
borderRadius.cardInner: rounded-2xl (16px) — inner elements, image containers within cards

shadows._principle: Shadows are soft and diffuse. Never hard or offset. Used to lift cards and CTAs above the surface, not to create drama.

navbar._description: Fixed top nav. Two states: transparent (over hero) and solid (on scroll). Logo is icon + wordmark. Links are restrained. Two CTAs at right.

logo.mark: w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-fairway-500 — contains 'GS' initials in white font-display

navbar.links: font-body text-sm text-white/80 hover:text-gold-400 transition-colors tracking-wide
navbar.ctaOutline: px-5 py-2 text-sm font-body font-medium text-white border border-white/30 rounded-full hover:border-gold-400 hover:text-gold-400
navbar.ctaPrimary: px-5 py-2 text-sm font-body font-medium text-forest-900 bg-gold-400 rounded-full hover:bg-gold-300 shadow-md

hero._description: Full-viewport-height. Photography background with layered gradient overlays. Left-column content, right-column glass card. Decorative floating circles.

decorativeBlobs._note: Three to four absolutely-positioned circles. They bleed off-screen edges and are semi-transparent. CRITICAL to the brand identity.
decorativeBlobs.large: absolute top-[-80px] right-[-80px] w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-fairway-500/20 blur-3xl
decorativeBlobs.outline: absolute bottom-[80px] right-[10%] w-72 h-72 rounded-full border-4 border-fairway-400/30 animate-float
decorativeBlobs.glow: absolute top-[20%] right-[15%] w-44 h-44 rounded-full bg-gold-400/15 blur-2xl
decorativeBlobs.ring: absolute top-[15%] right-[8%] w-56 h-56 rounded-full border-2 border-white/20 animate-float

hero.kicker: font-accent italic text-fairway-400 text-base tracking-wide mb-4
hero.headline: font-display font-black text-white text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl leading-none tracking-tight text-shadow-lg
hero.ctaPrimary: px-7 py-3.5 bg-gold-400 text-forest-900 font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full hover:bg-gold-300 shadow-xl hover:shadow-gold-400/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all
hero.ctaSecondary: px-7 py-3.5 bg-white/10 border border-white/30 text-white font-body font-medium text-sm rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

glassCard._note: Floats on the right side of the hero on desktop. Glass morphism. Contains a teaser image and destination details.
glassCard.base: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl max-w-xs
glassCard.title: font-display text-white text-xl font-bold
glassCard.footer: flex justify-between text-xs text-white/50 border-t border-white/10 pt-3

waveDivider._note: SVG wave at the very bottom, white fill, rotated 180deg to cut up into the hero from the white section below.

sectionHeader._description: Reusable pattern: kicker line + large headline + optional body copy. Used at the top of every major section.
sectionHeader._centeredVariant: text-center — used for courses, accommodation, testimonials, planTrip
sectionHeader._leftVariant: text-left — used for packages, costaDelSol, transfers
sectionHeader.kicker: font-accent italic text-fairway-600 text-sm md:text-base tracking-wide mb-3
sectionHeader.kickerOnDark: font-accent italic text-fairway-400 text-sm md:text-base tracking-wide mb-3
sectionHeader.headline: font-display font-bold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-forest-900 leading-tight mb-4
sectionHeader.headlineOnDark: font-display font-bold text-4xl md:text-5xl text-white leading-tight mb-4

card._description: The primary content display unit. Used for courses, hotels, steps, testimonials.
card.base: rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-forest-100 shadow-sm bg-white transition-all duration-300

imageContainer.gradient: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-forest-900/70 via-transparent to-transparent

imageBadge.style: bg-gold-400 text-forest-900 text-xs font-body font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full

card.categoryPill: text-xs font-body text-fairway-600 bg-fairway-50 border border-fairway-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
card.tag: text-xs font-body text-forest-600 bg-forest-50 border border-forest-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
card.footer: flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t border-forest-100
card.cta: text-xs font-body font-semibold text-fairway-700 hover:text-fairway-900 transition-colors
card.fullWidthCTA: w-full py-2.5 text-sm font-body font-semibold text-fairway-700 border border-fairway-200 rounded-xl hover:bg-fairway-50 hover:border-fairway-400 transition-all

button._principle: All buttons are pill-shaped (rounded-full). Three variants: Primary (gold), Secondary (forest), Outline (border). Hover states always include a very subtle lift (-translate-y-0.5) on primaries.

primary.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-7 py-3.5 bg-gold-400 text-forest-900 font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full

secondary.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-7 py-3.5 bg-fairway-600 text-white font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full

dark.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-7 py-3.5 bg-forest-900 text-white font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full

outlineLight.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-7 py-3.5 bg-white/10 border border-white/30 text-white font-body font-medium text-sm rounded-full

outlineDark.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2 text-sm font-body font-medium text-white border border-white/30 rounded-full

white.base: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-7 py-3.5 bg-white text-forest-900 font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full border border-forest-200

small.modifier: px-5 py-2 text-sm (instead of px-7 py-3.5)

badge.gold: bg-gold-400 text-forest-900 text-xs font-body font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full
badge.fairway: text-xs font-body text-fairway-600 bg-fairway-50 border border-fairway-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
badge.forest: text-xs font-body text-forest-600 bg-forest-50 border border-forest-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
badge.white: text-xs font-body text-white bg-white/10 border border-white/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
badge.tier3: text-xs font-body font-semibold text-fairway-700 bg-fairway-50 border border-fairway-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
badge.tier4: text-xs font-body font-semibold text-forest-700 bg-forest-100 border border-forest-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
badge.tier5: text-xs font-body font-semibold text-gold-600 bg-gold-50 border border-gold-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

iconContainer.fairway: w-10 h-10 md:w-11 md:h-11 rounded-xl bg-fairway-600 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
iconContainer.fairwayLight: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-fairway-600/10 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
iconContainer.glass: w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-fairway-500/20 flex items-center justify-center
iconContainer.goldMark: w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-fairway-500 flex items-center justify-center

glassPanel._description: Used in hero right column and dark sections. Frosted glass effect.
glassPanel.base: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl

filterTab.active: px-5 py-2 text-sm font-body font-medium rounded-full bg-forest-900 text-white border border-forest-900 shadow-md
filterTab.inactive: px-5 py-2 text-sm font-body font-medium rounded-full bg-white text-forest-700 border border-forest-200 hover:border-forest-400 transition-all

stepCard._description: Numbered step cards used in 'Plan Your Golf Trip' and 'Design Your Package' sections.
stepCard.card: rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-forest-100 shadow-sm bg-white card-hover
stepCard.number: absolute top-3 left-3 font-display text-gold-400 font-bold text-3xl leading-none
stepCard.imageLabel: absolute bottom-3 left-3 right-3 font-body text-white text-xs font-medium leading-tight
stepCard.title: font-body font-semibold text-forest-900 text-sm mb-2

testimonialCard.wrapper: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-forest-100 shadow-sm
testimonialCard.quote: font-body text-forest-700/80 text-sm leading-relaxed mb-4 italic

featureRow._description: Icon + title + description in a horizontal row. Used inside the design-your-package panel.
featureRow.iconContainer: flex-shrink-0 w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl bg-fairway-600/10 flex items-center justify-center group-hover:bg-fairway-600/20 transition-colors
featureRow.stepBadge: font-body text-xs font-semibold text-fairway-500 bg-fairway-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full
featureRow.title: font-body font-semibold text-forest-900 text-sm mb-1

newsletterSection._description: Dark footer-adjacent section with gold CTA and email input.
newsletterSection.headline: font-display font-bold text-white text-3xl md:text-4xl
newsletterSection.input: flex-1 px-5 py-3 rounded-full bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 font-body text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-gold-400
newsletterSection.submitButton: px-6 py-3 bg-gold-400 text-forest-900 font-body font-semibold text-sm rounded-full hover:bg-gold-300 transition-all

navbar_mobile.menu: bg-forest-900/98 backdrop-blur-md px-6 pt-4 pb-6 flex flex-col gap-4 border-t border-white/10
navbar_mobile.link: font-body text-white/80 hover:text-gold-400 transition-colors py-2 border-b border-white/10
navbar_mobile.cta: mt-2 px-5 py-3 text-center text-sm font-body font-medium text-forest-900 bg-gold-400 rounded-full hover:bg-gold-300 transition-all

decorative._principle: Organic shapes are the SOUL of this brand. The floating circles and SVG wave dividers are non-negotiable. Every section must have its wave transition. Dark sections must have blob decorations.

blobs._description: Large abstract circles used as decorative backgrounds. They are ALWAYS absolutely positioned, often partially off-screen, never have borders except the 'outline' variant.

large.position: absolute, corner-positioned, often -80px to -120px outside viewport edge

blobs._rule: Use 2–4 blobs per dark section. Use 1–2 per light section. Never let blobs interfere with text readability. They live in the background plane (z-index 0 or negative, pointer-events-none).

waveDividers._description: SVG path waves that transition between sections. The wave's fill color MATCHES the background of the section it visually 'bleeds into'.
waveDividers._rule: Every section transition MUST have a wave divider. The wave sits at the bottom of the upper section OR the top of the lower section.
waveDividers.topOfSection: SVG at the very top of the section, with fill matching the CURRENT section's background (pushes into the section above)
waveDividers.bottomOfSection: SVG rotated 180deg at the very bottom, with fill matching the NEXT section's background
waveDividers.style: Organic, S-curve wave — not a simple sine wave. Has 6–8 control points for a natural, flowing shape.
waveDividers.implementation: Inline SVG, w-full block, overflow-hidden on parent, leading-none to remove gap

imageMosaics._description: Multi-image grid compositions used in the CostaDelSol section. Not a simple grid — has a dominant top image spanning full width with two smaller below.
imageMosaics.pattern1: col-span-2 tall image + 2 equal images below (2/3 + 1/3 height ratio)
imageMosaics.floatingBadge: Absolute positioned dark glass badge over the bottom-right image — shows key stat (70+ courses)

layout._principle: Alternating two-column and full-width layouts. No section uses the same layout as the one before it. This creates visual rhythm and prevents monotony.
pageFlow: Hero — full viewport, photography, left/right split
Packages — white, left text / right step-panel (2-col)
Costa del Sol — sage bg, left image mosaic / right text (2-col)
Sun Fairways Banner — sky bg, centered text only (full-width statement)
Golf Courses — sky-muted bg, centered header + 3-col card grid
Accommodation — sage bg, centered header + filter tabs + 3-col cards
Transfers — dark bg, left text / right 2x2 glass features (2-col)
Plan Your Trip — white, centered header + 4-col step cards
Testimonials — white, centered header + 3-col testimonial cards
Newsletter/Footer — dark bg, split layout + form

darkSections._note: Transfers and Newsletter sections use forest-900 background. They always have: blob decorations, top/bottom waves, reversed text colors (white/gold), glassmorphism feature panels.

animation._principle: Animations are restrained and purposeful. Motion should feel like physics — natural easing, never bouncy or cartoonish.

fadeUp.stagger: Each hero element delays by 0.15s increments starting at 0.1s
fadeUp._usage: Hero section only — kicker, headline, subline, body, CTAs, trust bar

float._usage: Decorative blob circles and hero glass card. Use different animation-delay values (0.5s, 1s) so blobs are out of phase.

pulseSlow._usage: Subtle text glows or decorative elements when needed

interaction.cardHover: transition-all duration-300, -translate-y-1, shadow-xl — applied to all card components
interaction.imageZoom: group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500 — inside card image containers
interaction.buttonLift: hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all — primary gold buttons only
interaction.iconContainerFill: group-hover:bg-fairway-600/20 transition-colors — feature row icon bg

photography._principle: Photography is the hero. Images are always full-bleed within their containers. Always has a gradient overlay on cards to ensure text legibility. Never use stock-looking business photography — must feel like real golf courses.

treatment.cardImage: w-full h-full object-cover, with dark-to-transparent gradient overlay from bottom
treatment.heroBackground: object-cover bg-center, with left-to-right + bottom-to-top gradient overlays

imageTopics: Golf fairways and greens — wide landscape shots, not close-up ball shots
Aerial views of courses with blue sky and Mediterranean coast in background
Luxury hotel pools and exteriors in Andalusian architecture style
Golf groups (actual people playing, not posed stiff shots)
Costa del Sol coastline visible in the background behind fairways
Sunset/golden-hour shots preferred — matches the gold accent color

forms._principle: Forms are minimal — just what's needed. Inputs are pill-shaped to match the button language. Always on dark backgrounds in this design.
forms.input: px-5 py-3 rounded-full bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 font-body text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-gold-400 focus:ring-0
forms.label: font-body text-white/70 text-xs mb-1.5 block

responsive._principle: Mobile-first. The mobile version is a vertically-stacked, single-column layout. Decorative blobs are smaller on mobile. Wave dividers remain but at reduced height.

breakpoints.md: 768px — 2-col section layouts activate, hero shows glass card

mobilePriorities: Nav collapses to hamburger, mobile sheet opens from top
Hero is single column, glass card hidden on mobile
Section kickers and headlines scale down (text-4xl on mobile vs 5xl desktop)
CTA buttons stack vertically if they don't fit in a row
Trust bar items reduce spacing on mobile
Blob decorations reduce in size (scale down by ~40%)

tailwindTokens._note: Direct mapping from design tokens to Tailwind v3 class names for quick reference when building components

do: Always use wave SVG dividers between every section
Always include decorative blob circles on dark sections and hero
Use the gold accent color for the PRIMARY CTA only (1 per section max)
Use font-accent italic for all section kicker labels
Round everything — buttons are pill, cards are rounded-3xl
Overlap and float elements (glass card over hero, badge over mosaic)
Include a trust/stats bar in the hero
Use staggered animation delays on hero elements
Give images a gradient overlay so text always legible on top
Use 'Costa del Sol' in headings — it's the destination brand
Write section kickers in the format 'Step X — Short Description'
Keep body copy under max-w-lg on left-aligned layouts
Use the filterTab pattern (pill tabs) for filtering hotels by star tier
dont: Don't use hard/sharp corners on any UI element
Don't use Inter, Roboto, or Arial — DM Sans is the ONLY sans-serif
Don't use purple, pink, or any non-palette colors
Don't put gold on green backgrounds (contrast issue)
Don't omit the wave divider between sections
Don't center-align text in 2-column sections (left-align the text column)
Don't use more than 1 gold CTA per section — it loses impact
Don't make blobs smaller than 150px or larger than 400px
Don't animate more than 2 blobs simultaneously
Don't stack two dark sections without a light section between them
Don't use stock photo business imagery — must feel like real golf
Don't use bold weight on font-accent — it defeats its delicate character
Don't underline links — use color changes or arrow icons instead
